description: Plan-mode review gate: PreToolUse blocks ExitPlanMode unless review-plan has produced a slug-scoped gate file at ~/.claude/plans/.review-ready-<slug>, or a prior successful exit left an `.exited-<slug>` sentinel (idempotent re-exit allowed silently). Active slug is identified from the session transcript (transcript_path on hook stdin), with mtime fallback only when the transcript is unavailable — avoids misidentifying the active plan when ~/.claude/plans/ holds stale files from other sessions. PostToolUse renames the gate to the sentinel and emits an advisory nudge to invoke /schedule-plan-tasks. A second PreToolUse gate (plan-unknowns-gate.py) runs a 3-stage plan-review state machine, each stage failing open: (1) a soft review-plan nudge (hard under CLAUDE_PLAN_REQUIRE_REVIEW=1); (2) a Codex (OpenAI CLI, read-only sandbox) unknowns audit that blocks until an '## Open Unknowns' section exists and tags bullets needing active go-find-out research with [investigate]; (3) a closed-loop investigation gate — when agentic unknowns are tagged, it blocks until /investigate-plan has run (proven by a host `.investigated-<slug>` sentinel) or the user waives via /waive-investigation, and fails open when the hermes container is down. plan-review-cleanup.py (PostToolUse) clears the investigation sentinels after a successful exit. Degrades to a self-audit instruction when the codex CLI is unavailable; opt out with CLAUDE_PLAN_UNKNOWNS_GATE=0.

hooks.statusMessage: Codex auditing plan for unresolved unknowns...
